description: KNOWN GAP (pinned for visibility, per the R12 rule; fix is a later unit): raw-index citation markers reach the user verbatim while the channel footer speaks a different language. Provenance: live CLI session 2026-06-11, plan 2026-06-11-001. Construction: document_chunks loads the spy document connector with 8 chunks served in display windows of 5 -- the pre-fetch (P-201 resolves at confidence 1.0, so _gather_context searches documents) registers chunks 1-5 as visible [1]..[5]; the scripted search_documents tool call retrieves the next window, serialized with citation_index 6..8 (offset = the 5 already-registered slots) and registered at those positions. The model's final answer cites [6] and [8] inline with a proper <citations> block. TODAY both resolve (the registry continues past the pre-fetch slots), the block is stripped, but the raw [6]/[8] markers survive in the user text while the channel footer renders the same two citations as [source:page] entries -- visually unrelated numbering. The future fix rewrites this presentation; flipping this fixture's expected block is part of that fix.
user_messages: What is the bearing maintenance plan for P-201?

document_chunks.content: P-201 overview: single-stage centrifugal cooling water pump.
Operating envelope: 45 m3/h nominal flow at 2950 rpm.
Mechanical seal: cartridge type, plan 11 flush.
Coupling: spacer type, laser alignment required after seal work.
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours.
Seal replacement procedure: depressurize, drain, pull cartridge.
Grease the bearing housings with NLGI 2 grease every 500 hours.

turns.content:
Replace the drive-end bearing every 8000 operating hours [6]. Between replacements, grease the bearing housings with NLGI 2 grease every 500 hours [8].

<citations>
[6]
[8]
</citations>
